calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-28-2016 Vacated

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-29-2016 Off Calendar

Appellant Toms Metal Specialists, Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Conduct Limited Discovery
Off Calendar Mar-17-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:

Mia S. Blackler, Esq., of Buchalter Nemer, A Professiona Law Corporation appearing for Appellant Tom's Metal Specialists, Inc., a California Corporation. (415) 227 0900.

Json Szydlik, Esq., appearing for Respondent Yuchi (Judy) Liu. (415) 750 9900.

APPELLANT TOM'S METAL SPECIALISTS, INC.'s Motion To Conduct Limited Discovery is heard this day. After argument of respective counsel the Court the Court ordered motion granted. Order signed in open court.

Judge Pro-tem: Chuck Geerhart; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Not Reported.(302/JPT)
